name: Palma Co., Ltd.
summary: Palma Co., Ltd. provides self-storage business solutions in Japan. It offers self-storage business process outsourcing services, as well as develops and operates Claris, a web reservation settlement/inventory management system; and Kuragime, a web property information function for API distribution. The company also provides self-storage business management consulting and building leasing services; and develops and sells self-storage facilities under the Keep it brand. Palma Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1969 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
